_comment: Canonical aigentry ecosystem manifest. Source of truth for the shared README ecosystem table. Versions re-verified live via `npm view` on 2026-07-05 (telepty 0.6.9 -> 0.6.11; all others unchanged). Vendored byte-identical into each repo; refresh via aigentry-devkit/scripts/sync-readme-tooling.mjs on any version change. A repo's own row is overridden with its live package.json version at regen time.

modules.name: devkit
modules.role: Installer/scaffold for the AI dev environment

modules.name: aterm
modules.role: Terminal launcher with native session IPC
modules.note: Published @dmsdc-ai/aterm 0.2.14 is UNLICENSED; local repo HEAD intends MIT (0.2.13). Table records the PUBLISHED reality per §13.

modules.name: orchestrator
modules.role: Control tower that drives sessions via telepty
